description: Refactor the 'TransactionEvent' class in the 'banking-events' project (~/IdeaProjects/banking-events) from a traditional Java POJO to a Java Record. Convert 'TransactionEvent.java' to a record type while preserving the constructor validation logic (amount > 0) and removing boilerplate code like explicit getters, equals, hashCode, and toString. Update 'AuditService.java' to use the new record accessors and ensure the project compiles and all tests in 'TransactionEventTest' pass.
